hyperedges.label: 4-stage analysis pipeline (gather -> diff -> llm -> persist -> feedback)
Three-layer rules engine (routing + flags + LLM instructions)
Flag resolution chain (ENV -> DB scope -> default)
All four deployment recipes (docker-compose, kubernetes, helm, bare-metal)
VCS webhook integration pattern (GitHub, GitLab) with HMAC/secret validation and idempotency
LLM providers privacy spectrum: closed-loop (Ollama) vs cloud BYOK with data-exfiltration warning
Review Preset Family (5 PR review presets)
v0.1 Reference SPA Screen Components
Shared Design Token Sources
Backend services
Data stores
External integrations

hyperedges.label: 4-stage analysis pipeline (gather -> diff -> llm -> persist -> feedback)
Three-layer rules engine (routing + flags + LLM instructions)
Flag resolution chain (ENV -> DB scope -> default)
All four deployment recipes (docker-compose, kubernetes, helm, bare-metal)
VCS webhook integration pattern (GitHub, GitLab) with HMAC/secret validation and idempotency
LLM providers privacy spectrum: closed-loop (Ollama) vs cloud BYOK with data-exfiltration warning
Review Preset Family (5 PR review presets)
v0.1 Reference SPA Screen Components
Shared Design Token Sources
Backend services
Data stores
External integrations
